title: Job Opening Teacher at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
